basic_details.job_title: IISER Pune Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Computer Lab Assistant and Office Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune)
basic_details.post_name: Computer Lab Assistant and Office Assistant (Multi-skilled)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune (IISER Pune) Recruitment 2026: Indian Institute of Science Education and Research Pune has released the official notification for 2 Computer Lab Assistant and Office Assistant (Multi-skilled) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc / M. Tech in Mathematics / Physics / Computer Science or related fields with at least 55% marks or equivalent grades, Bachelor's degree in any discipline with at least 55% marks or equivalent grades with excellent proficiency in office applications such as MS Word, Excel and PowerPoint
qualification.details: Computer Lab Assistant: M.Sc / M. Tech in Mathematics / Physics / Computer Science or related fields with at least 55% marks or equivalent grades. Minimum 2 years of relevant experience. Should be proficient in programming languages including Python and computational math packages such as Sage Math. Familiarity with Linux system. Experience in Education Research as evidenced in a thesis project. Familiarity with cognitive / learning sciences literature will be preferred. Office Assistant (Multi-skilled): Bachelor's degree in any discipline with at least 55% marks or equivalent grades with excellent proficiency in office applications such as MS Word, Excel and PowerPoint. Minimum 2 years of relevant experience. Proficiency in IT skills, MS Office, and accounting software. Manage logistics and handle day-to-day office work, including financial transactions, accommodation bookings, and local transportation. Assist in procurement of materials and tools for workshops. Handle GeM procurement, track projects, and prepare budget summaries. Draft official correspondence for the education sector and government departments.

selection_process: Email Application Shortlisting Walk-in Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IISER Pune Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IISER Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the IISER Pune Recruitment 2026 is 29-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the posts of Computer Lab Assistant and Office Assistant (Multi-skilled).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Computer Lab Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Computer Lab Assistant post, candidates need an M.Sc / M. Tech in Mathematics / Physics / Computer Science or related fields with at least 55% marks.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 28 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for these contractual positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary of Rs. 30,000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for IISER Pune Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted via email.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC, SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q8. When is the walk-in interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the IISER Pune Recruitment 2026 will be held on 01-06-2026.

faq.question: Q9. What are the key responsibilities of an Office Assistant (Multi-skilled)?
faq.answer: The Office Assistant will handle day-to-day office work, financial transactions, logistics, procurement, and draft official correspondence.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page.
